para_trans: Under the aegis of the Department of Minority Development
The General Administration Department has invited applications for the posts of (Upper Class), Short Writer (Lower Class) and Clerk Typist.
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Read: - Minority Development Department, Government Decision No. Avivi-6524 / Q. No.88 / Ka.1,
The Government Decision in the Government Decision referred to herein in paragraph 1 is item no.
"2) Clerk Typist: - General Administration Department, Notification No. RTR 201 / P.No.
"Clerk Typist: - General Administration Department, Notification No. RTR 2014 / P.No.
This Government Corrigendum is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
